sources.title: AI Video Generator Market Size, Share, Growth Report 2034
sources.claim: Global AI video generator software market valued at $1.23B in 2025, growing to $1.81B in 2026 and $21.61B by 2034 at a 46.0% CAGR

sources.title: AI Video Generator Market Size, Share | Industry Report 2033
sources.claim: AI video generator market estimated at $788.5M in 2025, reaching $946.4M in 2026, CAGR 20.3% through 2033

sources.title: AI Video Startup Runway Raises $315M at $5.3B Valuation, Eyes More Capable World Models
sources.claim: Runway closed $315M Series E led by General Atlantic at $5.3B post-money valuation, February 10, 2026

sources.title: OpenAI Is Shutting Down Its Sora Video App Just Months After Launch
sources.claim: OpenAI announced Sora shutdown on March 24, 2026; web and app discontinued April 26, 2026

sources.title: Why OpenAI Really Shut Down Sora
sources.claim: Sora burned ~$1M/day in compute while peak user count collapsed from 1M to fewer than 500,000; $2.1M lifetime revenue; Disney's $1B partnership died with the shutdown

sources.title: Kuaishou Confirms Seeking External Funding for Kling AI Video Unit
sources.claim: Kling AI reportedly at ~$500M annualized revenue run rate in Q1 2026, with Tencent-led round discussed at $20B valuation

sources.title: Kling AI, Runway, Vidu: The AI Video Generators Set to Replace OpenAI's Sora
sources.claim: Post-Sora market consolidation: Kling weekly active users jumped 4% to 2.6M average following Sora shutdown

sources.title: U.S. Digital Video Ad Spend to Surpass $80B in 2026
sources.claim: U.S. digital video ad spend to exceed $80B in 2026, growing 11% YoY; 66% of buyers testing or planning agentic AI for video campaigns

sources.title: MPA Calls on TikTok Owner ByteDance to Curb New AI Model That Created Tom Cruise Deepfake
sources.claim: MPA filed complaint against ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 after viral Tom Cruise/Brad Pitt deepfake; alleged unauthorized training on Hollywood copyrighted films

sources.title: GOP Senator Unveils Draft of Sweeping AI Legislation
sources.claim: Sen. Blackburn's AI legislation framework includes No Fakes Act (digital likeness rights), deepfake watermarking requirements, NIST content provenance standards — March 2026

sources.title: AI Video Generation Statistics 2026: Market Growth, Adoption Rates & Cost Savings
sources.claim: 73% of Fortune 500 companies use AI video tools; AI cut production cost from $4,500 to ~$400/minute (91% reduction); agencies produce 11x more content per month with AI

sources.title: AI Video Market After Sora: Runway, Kling, and Veo
sources.claim: Runway, Kling, Veo, and Pika compete for $2.4B opportunity; 124M monthly active users across AI video platforms in January 2026

sources.title: Kling AI Review 2026: Features, Pricing & Is It Worth It?
sources.claim: Kling AI launched June 2024 by Kuaishou; 22M+ users; 168M video clips generated; $240M ARR by December 2025 — 19 months post-launch

sources.title: State Deepfake Laws in 2026: What's Changed and What's Next
sources.claim: As of April 2026, 46 U.S. states have enacted legislation directly targeting AI-generated media and deepfakes

sources.title: AI Video Market Share, Size, Growth, CAGR at 36.20%
sources.claim: AI video market growing at 36.20% CAGR in 2026; AI video ad spend projected at $9.1B globally in 2026 — approximately 12% of all digital video advertising

unverified_claims: Runway estimated annual revenue of $75M-$100M ARR — multiple sources cite different figures ($75M, $100M, $300M); treated as [unverified] in market share estimates
Pika Labs valuation — widely cited as $1.5B from 2024 fundraise but no 2026 update found
Apple on-device video generation in iOS 19 — based on analyst reports, not confirmed by Apple
Sora compute cost of $15M/day — some sources cite $1M/day, others $15M/day; higher figure used as reported in Sora Shutdown Guide (kaopiz.com); treat as [estimated]
notes: Growth rates: growth_5y (+1,800%) estimated from near-zero commercial market in 2021 to $1.81B in 2026 per Fortune Business Insights — no single source covers full 5-year span. growth_1y (+47%) sourced from Fortune Business Insights ($1.23B → $1.81B). growth_3m (+108% ARR) sourced from Kling AI ARR growth from $240M (Dec 2025) to ~$500M (Q1 2026) as the most-cited recent growth data point.
